content.question: Do the divergent findings on SES-outcome correlations (Horn/TARKI vs. PISA-comparative) reflect genuine substantive disagreement about tracking effects, or differences in methodology, timing, sample composition, and outcome definition?
content.reduction_path: Obtain detailed methodological descriptions of both studies (cohort definition, outcome measures, confounding control); request re-analysis using consistent outcome variable and temporal window; interview researchers to clarify whether findings are genuinely contradictory or address different policy questions.
